description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a rectangular, slightly angled profile and a light beige plastic casing. The keyboard features a standard key layout, including a full alphanumeric section, function keys, arrow keys, and a numeric keypad on the right. The keycaps are uniformly colored in a matching beige tone, with visible legends printed on each key. The surface of the keyboard appears matte with some minor discoloration, suggesting signs of use. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements, and the keyboard does not show any attached cable or wireless receiver. The overall design is utilitarian and typical of older desktop keyboards.
description: A beige, full-size computer keyboard with a standard key layout and numeric keypad, showing minor signs of use and no visible branding or cable.
description_view_0: Angled view from the left side, showing the full key layout and the slight elevation towards the back.
description_view_1: Direct front view, clearly displaying all keys including the alphanumeric section and numeric keypad.
description_view_2: Angled view from the right side, highlighting the numeric keypad and the keyboard's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the back edge of the keyboard with no visible ports or cables.
